statics.description: CARDNAME's power and toughness are each equal to twice the number of creatures you control.

triggers.description: At the beginning of each combat, CARDNAME gains flying until end of turn if you control a creature with flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance.
